creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231261
Patch for webp

Update (lib)webp to 1.2.2 and switch to CMake for faster builds and .cmake files for other projects

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #2 stable/13-n248607-93a95ebbf7c (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #2 stable/13-n247814-f9f5d846b72 (aarch64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.0-RELEASE (i386)

Tested with following dependencies (Poudriere bulk, 12.2-RELEASE (amd64):
